FREQUENCY
1000 Hz
CH1 (Input) --
CH2 (Output) --
Phase Shift 180°
Circuit: JFET + Darlington
Topology: Common Source + Emitter Follower
Bandwidth: 20Hz–20kHz
Input Z: ~1.0 MΩ
Output Z: < 1 Ω

High impedance JFET input stage paired with a high-current Darlington buffer for an 8Ω speaker load.
